aboutText:
My dream is to be a front-end developer.
In order to grow one step further and achieve my dream, I will be a web publisher who is not refined to the existing things, is not afraid of learning, and always strives to develop.

list1.text1: Semantic markup work considering web standards and access

list3.text2: Run specific events when rendering using useEffect
list3.text3: Delivering a single object to a component using props

list5.text1: Implement a variety of interactions using life cycles

list6.text1: Share the status of your work

portfolio.text3: National Museum of Modern and Contemporary Art(React)_ clone coding
